Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Paris Olympics 2024: South Africa slip further in medal table – UPDATED

Heading into Friday, 9 August’s action at the Paris Olympics 2024, Team South Africa finds itself in 41st place in the medal table.

Heading into Friday, 9 August’s action at theParis Olympics 2024,Team South Africafinds itself in41stplace in the medal table.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

South Africa have won a gold, a silver and two bronze medals to date.

The gold and silver medals were won byTatjana Smithin the women’s 100m breaststroke and 200m breaststroke, respectively.

The men’srugby sevensteam as well asAlan Hatherlyin the men’s mountain bike cross country won the bronze medals.

A total of85countries out of the 206 competing in France have won at least one bronze medal.

This year’s Olympics will end on Sunday, 11 August.

Team South Africa is represented by 138 athletes in Paris, competing in 19 sports.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Correct as at the time of publishing on Friday, 9 August at 08:30 (SA time).
